message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "bijection_partitions_length_le_N_and_NPartition"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset

noncomputable def bijection_partitions_length_le_N_and_NPartition (N : ℕ) :
    {p : Nat.Partition (∑ i : Fin N, 0) // p.parts.card ≤ N} ≃ NPartition N where
  toFun := λ ⟨p, h⟩ =>
    let parts' : Fin N → ℕ := λ i =>
      if hi : i.val < p.parts.card then
        (p.parts.sort (·≥·)).get ⟨i.val, hi⟩
      else 0
    { parts := parts'
      antitone := by
        intro i j hij
        dsimp [parts']
        split_ifs with hi hj
        · have hcard : (p.parts.sort (·≥·)).length = p.parts.card := by simp
          have hpos : 0 < p.parts.card := by
            by_contra! hzero
            have : p.parts.card = 0 := by omega
            have : p.parts = 0 := by
              simpa [Multiset.card_eq_zero] using this
            sorry
          sorry
        · exact Nat.zero_le _
        · exact Nat.zero_le _
        · exact le_rfl }
  invFun := λ μ =>
    let partsMultiset : Multiset ℕ := (Finset.image μ.parts Finset.univ).val
    let partsSum : ℕ := partsMultiset.sum
    have hsum : partsSum = ∑ i : Fin N, μ.parts i := by
      simp [partsMultiset, Finset.sum_image]
    have hcard : partsMultiset.card ≤ N := by
      calc
        partsMultiset.card = (Finset.image μ.parts Finset.univ).card := rfl
        _ ≤ Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) := Finset.card_image_le
        _ = N := by simp
    have hparts_pos : ∀ i ∈ partsMultiset, 0 < i := by
      intro i hi
      have : i ∈ Finset.image μ.parts Finset.univ := hi
      rcases Finset.mem_image.1 this with ⟨j, _, hj⟩
      have : μ.parts j ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
      have hpos : μ.parts j > 0 := by
        by_contra! hzero
        have : μ.parts j = 0 := by omega
        have : μ.parts j = 0 := this
        sorry
      sorry
    have hparts_sum : partsMultiset.sum = partsSum := rfl
    ⟨{ parts := partsMultiset
       parts_pos := hparts_pos
       parts_sum := hparts_sum }, hcard⟩
  left_inv := by
    intro ⟨p, h⟩
    ext
    simp
  right_inv := by
    intro μ
    ext i
    simp
",
      "notes": [
        "The proof is incomplete; the construction of the bijection is sketched but the antitone condition and positivity proofs are not fully fleshed out. The status is cannot_prove_from_visible_context because the required lemmas about sorting and positivity are not available in the visible context."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-005",
      "used_context": [
        "NPartition structure with parts and antitone",
        "Nat.Partition structure with parts, parts_pos, parts_sum",
        "Finset.card_image_le",
        "Finset.sum_image"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
